title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss their adoption of AI coding tools at scale. Topics include workflow changes, productivity measurement, and lessons learned from deploying AI across development lifecycles and teams.
